ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the borough */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the borough was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the borough's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the neighborhood belongs to */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the coordinate belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the coordinate */,
  "coordinate_type" TEXT /* Type of coordinate (e.g., centroid, boundary) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coordinate was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coordinate's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geo_coordinates_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the age distribution in the neighborhood */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the gender distribution in the neighborhood */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the ethnicity distribution in the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic data was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zoning_info" (
  "zoning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zoning entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the zoning entry belongs to */,
  "zoning_type" TEXT /* Type of zoning (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zoning regulations */,
  "zoning_regulations" TEXT /* Detailed text of zoning regulations */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zoning information was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zoning information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zoning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zoning_info_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points_of_interest" (
  "poi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point of interest */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the point of interest belongs to */,
  "poi_name" TEXT /* Name of the point of interest */,
  "poi_type" TEXT /* Type of point of interest (e.g., park, restaurant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the point of interest */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the point of interest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the point of interest was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the point of interest's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_of_interest_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, planner) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the census entry belongs to */,
  "census_year" INTEGER /* Year of the census */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood according to the census */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the age distribution in the neighborhood according to the census */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the gender distribution in the neighborhood according to the census */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the ethnicity distribution in the neighborhood according to the census */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the census data was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the census data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_stats" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the crime entry belongs to */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., burglary, assault) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of crimes of the specified type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime statistics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime statistics were added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_stats_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental metric */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of environmental metric (e.g., air quality, noise pollution) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the environmental metric */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the environmental metric was measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environmental metric was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environmental metric's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the import belongs to */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data imported (e.g., census data, crime stats) */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "import_message" TEXT /* Message or log of the data import */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data import was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data import's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
